meaning: n.首领,队长,收割台,页眉 标题,报头
examples: McPherson took the corner and James crashed his header off the crossbar and over the line.
In the MON configuration file, ensure the header reflects the proper paths.
Striker Abby Wambach gave her team a two to one lead with a header off Lauren Cheney's corner kick in the seventy-ninth minute.
Melissa messages come with a subject header that starts "Important Message From, " followed by a name.
Samba came closest to scoring but his header was cleared off the line by Dean Whitehead.
